Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1 - Search emails for Elena's message about the invoice safety fix. Discovers email from elena.rostova@moveops.com to lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com and samira.tariq@moveops.com (CC marcus.thorne@moveops.com), April 25, subject "Status on invoice safety fix," referencing Marcus's end-of-week claim. Tool: search_emails.
OE 2 - Search sent emails for Lena's message to Marcus. Discovers email from lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com to marcus.thorne@moveops.com, April 23, describing a narrow filename-to-customer-name check in one to two days and explicitly stating "Please treat this as an informal estimate from me, not a committed team delivery date." Tool: search_emails.
OE 3 - Search Slack #engineering (C003) for messages about the invoice safeguard. Discovers Samira's message (TS: 1776993060) warning against a quick hack and calling for a full design review with proper scoping. Tool: conversations_search_messages on C003.
OE 4 - Search Slack #finance (C005) for Marcus's message to Elena. Discovers Marcus's message (TS: 1777003860) inflating Lena's informal estimate into "engineering committed to getting the invoice safety fix in by end of week." Tool: conversations_search_messages or conversations_history on C005.
OE 5 - Retrieve the invoice safeguard ticket (linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2). Discovers state_backlog, priority 2, no due date set, assigned to Lena, last updated April 6. Tool: linear_get_issue.
OE 6 - Read comments on linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2. Discovers Lena's April 6 deprioritization comment and Marcus's April 22 comment describing the Sunbelt/Palmetto failure and demanding a realistic path and owner. Tool: linear_list_comments.
OE 7 - Search emails or Slack for details on the Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice swap. Discovers that Hana Kim swapped PDF attachments between Sunbelt Venture Partners ($4,800) and Palmetto Community Foundation ($2,400), exposing nonprofit pricing to a for-profit client. Tool: search_emails or conversations_search_messages.
OE 8 - List all Linear issues assigned to moveops_lena_bjorkstrom to assess current workload. Discovers 7 open tickets including ENG-205, 206, 207, 214, 215, 217 (ExpenseBot) and the invoice safeguard. Tool: linear_list_issues.
OE 9 - Check ExpenseBot tickets for completion signals to determine which are done vs. stale. Reviews comments and Slack messages for ENG-205/206/207 (core engine, built in staging), ENG-214/215 (config fixes, deployed), ENG-217 (pipeline hardening, schema gate unconfirmed). Tool: linear_get_issue and/or linear_list_comments.
OE 10 - Update linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2: elevate priority, change state from backlog, set a due date. Tool: linear_update_issue.
OE 11 - Create a comment on linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2 documenting what the narrow fix covers (filename-to-customer-name mismatch at upload) and does not cover (renamed files, generic names, document parsing, multi-entity billing). Tool: linear_create_comment.
OE 12 - Look up Samira Tariq's contact details to get her email. Tool: contacts_search_contacts.
OE 13 - Send email to samira.tariq@moveops.com summarizing the miscommunication chain (Lena's informal estimate to Marcus, Marcus's inflation to Elena, Samira's design review position) and ticket status so she can reply to Elena accurately. Tool: send_email.
OE 14 - Create a 30-minute calendar event with Samira for April 27 to align on scope before she responds to Elena. Tool: calendar_add_calendar_event.
OE 15 - Post in C003 (#engineering) summarizing the actual status of the invoice safeguard and clarifying what is and is not committed. Tool: conversations_add_message.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The Linear issue linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2 was updated (via linear_update_issue) with a state change from "state_backlog" to an active state (e.g., "state_in_progress", "state_todo", or similar non-backlog state).
outcome
 ✗✓✗✗✗✗ 17%
✗Run #1The linear_update_issue call for linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2 only updated the description field. No state parameter was passed to change the issue from backlog to an active state.
✓Run #2The agent called linear_update_issue with id 'linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2' and state 'In Progress', confirmed by the tool result showing state_id: 'In Progress'.
✗Run #3The agent called linear_update_issue on linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2 but set state to 'Backlog' — the same state it was already in. The issue was never moved to an active state like 'in_progress' or 'todo'.
✗Run #4The agent called linear_update_issue on linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2 but only updated the description field. The state remained 'state_backlog' — no state change was made to move it to an active state.
✗Run #5The trajectory shows no linear_update_issue call with id 'linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2'. The only linear_update_issue calls were on 'issue_p1_vectral_config', 'issue_p1_mosaic_malformed', and 'issue_pipeline_hardening' (all set to 'Done'). The invoice safeguard ticket ENG-187 was never moved out of backlog.
✗Run #6The linear_update_issue call for linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2 explicitly set state to 'Backlog' — keeping it in its current state rather than moving it to an active state. No state change to in_progress, todo, or any non-backlog state was made.
2 The Linear issue linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2 was updated (via linear_update_issue) with a priority higher than 2 (e.g., priority 1 or urgent).
outcome

outcome

outcome

outcome
